_meta.name: KASUMI AI Tool Definitions
_meta.description: Claude / GPT function-calling format tool definitions for the KASUMI Intelligent Workspace Platform REST API.

tools.name: kasumi_health
tools.description: Check if the KASUMI API server is running and healthy.

tools.name: kasumi_shell_get
tools.description: Get the currently active KASUMI shell (nexcel or wordo).

tools.name: kasumi_shell_switch
tools.description: Switch the active KASUMI shell.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_get_data
tools.description: Retrieve rows from the KASUMI Nexcel spreadsheet. Supports pagination.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_get_columns
tools.description: Get all column (field) definitions for the Nexcel spreadsheet including field types, IDs, and select options.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_search
tools.description: Full-text search across all Nexcel cells. Returns up to 200 matching rows.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_filter
tools.description: Filter Nexcel rows by a specific field and condition.

field_id.description: Field ID to filter on (see get_columns for IDs)

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_sort
tools.description: Sort all Nexcel rows by a specific field.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_insert_row
tools.description: Insert a new row into the Nexcel spreadsheet.

fields.description: Field ID → value map. Use kasumi_nexcel_get_columns to get field IDs. Example: {"1": "Task name", "5": "Alice"}

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_update_row
tools.description: Update an existing Nexcel row by ID.

fields.description: Field ID → new value map (partial update)

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_delete_row
tools.description: Delete a Nexcel row by ID. This action is undoable via kasumi_nexcel_undo.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_batch
tools.description: Batch insert and/or update multiple Nexcel rows in a single operation.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_format_cell
tools.description: Apply visual formatting to one or more Nexcel cells. Single cell: pass rowId+fieldId (camelCase; row_id/field_id snake_case also accepted). Batch: pass cells array with multiple {rowId,fieldId} pairs plus a shared format object.

rowId.description: Row ID (single cell mode). camelCase preferred; row_id also accepted.

fieldId.description: Field ID (single cell mode). camelCase preferred; field_id also accepted.

cells.description: Batch mode — list of cells to format. Each item: { rowId, fieldId }.

format.description: Format applied to all specified cells.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_add_conditional_format
tools.description: Add a conditional formatting rule to the Nexcel spreadsheet.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_import_csv
tools.description: Import CSV data into the Nexcel spreadsheet. Headers must match column names.

csv.description: CSV string with header row matching column names

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_export
tools.description: Export the Nexcel spreadsheet as CSV or JSON.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_undo
tools.description: Undo the last Nexcel mutation (insert/update/delete/batch/import).

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_redo
tools.description: Redo the last undone Nexcel mutation.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Nexcel cell.

tools.name: kasumi_nexcel_set_mode
tools.description: Set the Nexcel access mode (controls what operations are permitted).

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_get_document
tools.description: Get the full WORDO document in KASUMI JSON IR format (title + sections + blocks).

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_get_markdown
tools.description: Export the WORDO document as Markdown text.

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_import_markdown
tools.description: Replace the WORDO document content by importing Markdown. Existing content is replaced.

markdown.description: Full Markdown document. Use # for title.

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_set_title
tools.description: Set the WORDO document title.

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_get_outline
tools.description: Get the WORDO document heading outline (H1–H6 tree for navigation).

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_insert_block
tools.description: Insert a new content block into the WORDO document.

after_block_id.description: Insert after this block ID (default: end of section)

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_update_block
tools.description: Update the content or type of an existing WORDO block.

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_delete_block
tools.description: Delete a block from the WORDO document by ID.

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_add_comment
tools.description: Add an annotation comment to the WORDO document.

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_accept_changes
tools.description: Accept tracked changes in the WORDO document.

ids.description: Change IDs to accept. Omit to accept all.

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_reject_changes
tools.description: Reject tracked changes in the WORDO document.

ids.description: Change IDs to reject. Omit to reject all.

tools.name: kasumi_wordo_set_mode
tools.description: Set the WORDO access mode.
